translation: adj.  众所周知的， 著名的
example: This is probably their best-known song. 这可能是他们最有名的歌曲。
The whale nearest to the photographer is releasing air to aid its descent. 这只离摄影师最近的白鲸正呼出空气以帮助其下潜。

translation: adv.  [用于否定句中以加强语气]任何； 无论什么
example: She has shown no interest whatever in anything scientific. 凡是与科学有关的她都没有表现出任何兴趣。
a field of wheat 小麦地
Shall I take the wheel (= drive instead of someone else )? 我来开车好吗？

translation: conj.  然而， 但是， 尽管
example: The old system was fairly complicated whereas the new system is really very simple. 旧系统相当复杂，而新系统却很简单。

translation: pron&adj.  无论哪个， 无论哪些
example: Letting taxes rise abruptly would hurt not only the recovery but also whichever party the electorate ended up blaming. 突然的增税不但会妨害经济复苏，而且无论哪个政党这样做都会受到选民指责。

translation: v. 鞭笞；搅打；n. 鞭子
example: He whipped the horse into a canter. 他抽了一下鞭子，马儿就小跑起来。

translation: v. 低声地讲；v. 低语
example: You don’t have to whisper, no one can hear us. 你不必轻声轻语，没人听得到我们说话。
The lifeguard blew his whistle. 救生员吹响哨子。

translation: pron.  谁； 无论谁； 究竟是谁
example: I’ll take whoever wants to go. 谁想去我就带谁去。
a wholly satisfactory solution 完全令人满意的解决办法
the wicked stepmother in ‘Hansel and Gretel’ 《糖果屋》中那个恶毒的继母
They’re widening the road. 他们正在拓宽马路。
the widespread use of chemicals in agriculture 化学品在农业中的广泛使用
an elderly widow who was attacked and robbed last month 上个月遭到行凶抢劫的一位寡居老妇
a covered terrace extending the full width of the house 和房子同宽的有顶露台

translation: adj. 愿意的，心甘情愿的
example: I soon had an army of willing helpers. 我很快就拥有了一批热心的帮手。
a winding path 蜿蜒的小路
The bird flapped its wings furiously. 那只鸟使劲地拍打着翅膀。
copper wire 铜丝

translation: n.  智慧， 才智； 名言
example: a man of great wisdom 一个有大智慧的男人
a wise precaution 明智的预防措施
The information is there and waiting to be accessed by anyone with the wit to use it. 信息是现成的，等着有头脑的人去获取和利用。
calls for Britain to withdraw from the European Union 要求英国退出欧盟的呼声
The Chancellor has withstood the criticism and held firm. 总理顶住批评，坚持立场。
Police have appealed for witnesses to come forward. 警方呼吁目击者站出来。
a pack of wolves 一群狼
a wooden bench 木制长椅
a ball of wool 一团毛线
In University Square workmen are building a steel fence. 在大学广场工人们正在筑一个钢栅栏。
...a modestly equipped workshop. …一个装备普通的车间。
Today, doctors are fearing a worldwide epidemic. 如今，医生们在担心一次世界性的流行。
His books have sold more than 20 million copies worldwide. 他的书在全世界卖出了两千多万本。
...a new computer worm that disables security software. …一种使安全软件失灵的新型计算机蠕虫病毒。
A lot of teachers expect the situation to worsen over the next few years. 许多老师认为接下来的几年情形会更糟。

translation: n. 礼拜；崇拜；v. 崇拜
example: The ceremony must take place in a recognized place of worship . 该仪式必须在获得认可的敬拜场所举行。

translation: adj. 最坏的；adv. 最坏地
example: This is the worst recession for fifty years. 这是50年来最严重的一次经济衰退。
You should not deprecate your own worth. 你不应该贬低你自己的价值。
The house was full of worthless junk. 这房子里堆满了没有用的东西。
He wanted to do a worthwhile job. 他想做有意义的工作。
Leeds United were worthy winners of the competition. 利兹联队是比赛当之无愧的获胜者。

translation: n. 创伤，伤；v. 使受伤
example: A nurse cleaned and bandaged the wound. 护士把伤口清洗包扎好。
I’ve still got a few Christmas presents to wrap up. 我还有一些圣诞礼物要包起来。

translation: n. 失事；残骸；v. 破坏
example: ...the wreck of a sailing ship. …一艘帆船的残骸。
He broke his wrist climbing rocks for a cigarette ad. 他为了一个香烟广告攀岩折断了手腕。
She’s one of my favourite writers. 她是我最喜欢的作家之一。

translation: n.  书写， 写； 著作
example: Some of his most powerful writing is based on his childhood experiences. 他的一些最震慑人心的作品是根据儿时经历写成的。
The X-ray showed that her leg was not broken. X光片显示她的腿没有骨折。
a builder’s yard 建筑工地
Alan stretched and yawned. 艾伦伸伸懒腰，打了个呵欠。

translation: adj. 每年的；adv. 一年一度
example: Salary levels are reviewed on a yearly basis. 工资水平每年都要审查。

translation: v. 屈服，产出；n. 产量
example: Our research has only recently begun to yield important results. 直到最近我们的研究才开始取得重要成果。

translation: n.  青年， 年轻人， 孩子
example: Other youngsters are not so lucky. 其他的年轻人没有这么幸运。
Despite his youth, he had travelled alone. 他虽然年纪还小，却已独自旅行过了。
San Francisco and Tokyo are both located in earthquake zones. 旧金山和东京都位于地震带。
